nta.declaration: clock cl; int temp; const int a = 2010; const int b = 2024; const int c = 2041; const int d = 2057; const int e = 2074; const int f = 2090; const int g = 2112; const int h = 2133; const int i = 2149; const int j = 2168; const int k = 2186; const int l = 2205; const int m = 2227; const int n = 2246; const int o = 2265; const int p = 2286; const int q = 2307; const int r = 2324;
